message:
⚡ OPA Policies card: parallel cluster checks and faster loading (#1455)

Replace sequential cluster checking with rolling parallel concurrency
(pool of 3 simultaneous cluster checks). Previously, N clusters were
checked one at a time — each requiring 2-3 kubectl calls at 15s timeout.
With 5 clusters this could take 75s+. Now clusters are checked 3 at a
time, reducing wall-clock time by ~3x.

Additional optimizations:
- Parallelize Steps 1+2 within each cluster check: namespace existence
  and constraints fetch now run concurrently via Promise.all()
- Reduce per-command timeouts from 15s to 10s (more than sufficient
  for lightweight namespace and constraint queries)
- Progressive display already works: skeleton dismissed as soon as
  first cluster finishes, remaining clusters show individual spinners

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
